recommendations.title: Satan's Little Helper
recommendations.overview: A naïve young boy unknowingly becomes the pawn of a serial killer.

recommendations.title: Pawn Shop Chronicles
recommendations.overview: The stories of a missing wife, a couple of meth heads and an Elvis impersonator are connected by the items found in a small town's pawn shop.

recommendations.title: The Door
recommendations.overview: A successful artist loses control of his life after his young daughter's death. A chance for a new start appears, but all is not what it seems.

recommendations.title: SS Experiment Love Camp
recommendations.overview: Near the end of WW2, prisoners of war are used in experiments to perfect the Arian race.

recommendations.title: Dad Wanted
recommendations.overview: What does a thrill-seeker tween girl do when her mom forbids her to enter a BMX race? Cast an actor with nothing to lose to play her approving dad.

recommendations.title: Ten Inch Hero
recommendations.overview: Four friends search for love and happiness while working at a California sandwich shop.

recommendations.title: OMG: Oh My God!
recommendations.overview: A shopkeeper takes God to court when his shop is destroyed by an earthquake.
